name: NetBrands Corp.
summary: PART I Overview NetBrands Corp. (the Company) was incorporated on December 1, 2017, as a Delaware corporation under the name Dense Forest Acquisition Corporation. On June 13, 2018, in anticipation of its acquisition of Global Diversified Holdings, Inc., a private New York snack and gourmet food company (GDHI), the Company changed its to Global Diversified Marketing Group Inc. On November 26, 2018, the Company consummated the acquisition of GDHI (the Acquisition). Prior to the Acquisition, the Co...
